title: How a man of God keeps his hidden life clean
caption:
There's a version of you nobody sees. The one at midnight. The one in the private tab. The one when you're alone and the day has been hard.

That version is the real one. And it's where character either gets built or it quietly rots.

A man of God is not the church version. He's not the gym version. He's the same guy everywhere — including in the dark.

If you can't say your private life would hold up under the light, that's not a place to start. It's the only place to start.

"Nothing in all creation is hidden from God's sight." — Hebrews 4:13

Send this to the man who's trying to get honest with himself.

#faith #integrity #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #scripture #thework #purity #christianity
